languages.text: "Это для нас честь и радость, Ваша Светлость. Мы очень долго ждали вас. Вот уж и не думал, что получится встретиться на моем веку..."

traits.locale_text: "Это для нас честь и радость, Ваша Светлость. Мы очень долго ждали вас. Вот уж и не думал, что получится встретиться на моем веку..."
traits.speaker: JanurZarkovSergeant

languages.text: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."
languages.original_text: "Это для нас честь и радость, Ваша Светлость. Мы очень долго ждали вас. Вот уж и не думал, что получится встретиться на моем веку..."

traits.locale_text: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."
"It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."
"Have the rules of good manners been observed now? Who are you?"
"It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."
"It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."
"It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."

languages.text: 「礼儀作法のルールは守られたか？ あなたは誰だ？」
languages.original_text: "Have the rules of good manners been observed now? Who are you?"

languages.text: "Bu hem onurdur hem de neşe {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gelişinizi o kadar bekledik ki... Doğrusu, bugünün geleceğini ömrümde göreceğimi hayal etmezdim."
languages.original_text: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."

traits.locale_text: "Bu hem onurdur hem de neşe {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gelişinizi o kadar bekledik ki... Doğrusu, bugünün geleceğini ömrümde göreceğimi hayal etmezdim."

languages.text: “荣幸之至，喜悦之至，舰长大人。我们一直都在等您，等得实在太久了。说真的，我这辈子都没想过能亲眼见到这一天……”
languages.original_text: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."

traits.locale_text: “荣幸之至，喜悦之至，舰长大人。我们一直都在等您，等得实在太久了。说真的，我这辈子都没想过能亲眼见到这一天……”

languages.text: "Es ist eine Ehre und eine Freude zugleich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir haben so lange auf Euer Kommen gewartet. Ich hätte nicht gedacht, dass ich diesen Tag erleben würde ..."
languages.original_text: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist eine Ehre und eine Freude zugleich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir haben so lange auf Euer Kommen gewartet. Ich hätte nicht gedacht, dass ich diesen Tag erleben würde ..."

languages.text: « C'est un honneur et une joie, Votre Seigneurie. Nous attendons votre arrivée depuis si longtemps. Pour ne rien vous cacher, je n'espérais plus y assister de mon vivant... »
languages.original_text: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un honneur et une joie, Votre Seigneurie. Nous attendons votre arrivée depuis si longtemps. Pour ne rien vous cacher, je n'espérais plus y assister de mon vivant... »

languages.text: «Es tanto un honor como una alegría, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Llevamos mucho tiempo esperando su llegada. Nunca imaginé que llegaría este día en toda mi vida...».
languages.original_text: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."

traits.locale_text: «Es tanto un honor como una alegría, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Llevamos mucho tiempo esperando su llegada. Nunca imaginé que llegaría este día en toda mi vida...».
